display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives dns2tcp; source_facts.executables uses dns2tcp-prefixed tools.
docs_sources: GitHub README for alex-sector/dns2tcp documents client and server usage examples and describes dns2tcp as relaying TCP connections over DNS.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; the alex-sector/dns2tcp GitHub repository contains the 0.5.2 release and README/man/source files for dns2tcp.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies TCP over DNS tunneling; source_facts.executables lists dns2tcpc and dns2tcpd client/server binaries.
